metadata.description: A plugin marketplace hosting installable agent plugins for AWS.

plugins.description: Build, deploy, and operate applications on AWS. Skills to author infrastructure-as-code, use core services, and complete common tasks.
plugins.name: aws-core

plugins.description: Build, deploy, and operate AI agents on AWS. Skills for scaffolding agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, connecting tools, memory, policies, evaluation, debugging, and production hardening.
plugins.name: aws-agents

plugins.description: Data lake, analytics, and ETL workflows with S3 Tables, AWS Glue, and Athena.
plugins.name: aws-data-analytics
